---
title: "Fig 4m - WT line profile, NMIIb-focus variant"
output: html_notebook
params:
  genotype: "WT"
  final_plot_channel: "Ch2"
  pdf_name: "Act_profile.pdf"
  write_csvs: FALSE
---

<!--
================================================================================
  Wrapper for Fig 4m, WT genotype, "NMIIb focus" variant.
================================================================================
  Includes the canonical template at:
      ../../templates/fig04m_line_profile_coloc.Rmd

  Parameters supplied above:
    - genotype = "WT"                  -> Ch2 (actin) NA cutoff = 30
                                          CSV prefix would be "WT"
                                          (CSVs not emitted; see write_csvs)
    - final_plot_channel = "Ch2"       -> final ribbon plot is df_summary2
                                          (actin profile)
    - pdf_name = "Act_profile.pdf"     -> ggsave filename for the panel.
    - write_csvs = FALSE               -> only the panel PDF is emitted;
                                          per-cell CSVs are SKIPPED (this
                                          variant only contributes the PDF).

  Original 241-line monolithic wrapper extracted into a template on
  2026-05-12.
-->

```{r child = "../../templates/fig04m_line_profile_coloc.Rmd"}
```
